title: MGN 485 (M) Amendment 1 MLC, 2006 -seafarer employment agreements application to trainees
body: "This notice should be read with the Merchant Shipping (Maritime Labour Convention) (Minimum Requirements for Seafarers etc.) Regulations 2014 and MGN 477(M) amendment 5 and replaces MGN 485 (M).  Amendment 1 updates references only.  Notice to   shipowners managers training providers masters and trainees.  "
